entry.title: this trend doesn't hit the same in San Francisco 🥲 #sanfrancisco #bayarea #hotsummernights #midjuly #sanfranciscolife #whimsysoul #california #karlthefog #marinelayer #northerncalifornia

entry.title: California is the BEST state and you can't convince me otherwise ❤️🌈🌲🌊✨ PS - I have a list of 50+ unique things to do in California (that most tourists miss) linked in my bio. Look for this video icon! #california #visitcalifornia #bayarea #southerncalifo

entry.title: Hey SF - there’s a NEW mini golf spot in the Mission!! ⛳️ Robin and I checked out @Holey Moley Golf USA new spot on South Van Ness and had SO much fun on their 18-hole mini golf course. They have so many over-the-top, creative course designs – my favorite
entry.content: Hey SF - there’s a NEW mini golf spot in the Mission!! ⛳️ Robin and I checked out @Holey Moley Golf USA new spot on South Van Ness and had SO much fun on their 18-hole mini golf course. They have so many over-the-top, creative course designs – my favorite

entry.title: secret swimming holes are our favorite 🤩 YES you can go swimming inside Big Trees State Park! It's best to ask the rangers when you drive in, they'll point you to spots along the river that are good and also safe to swim in that day. But my favorite is a

entry.title: stunning Napa wineries to visit ⬇️ 🍷 Listen, there are HUNDREDS of amazing wineries in Napa Valley, and while I haven't been to them all (I'm trying!!) there are some that just stick out to me as winners on the beauty scale. If you're looking for great

entry.title: Replying to @seanlawn breaking news! Second square is off the world cruise bingo card! Shoutout to @joe for alerting us today. What square do we think will be next? #ultimateworldcruise #worldcruise #bingo #worldcruisebingo #whimysoul #royalcaribbean #cr
